candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and matches reported total revenue values.
Explicit total revenue line with identical values; useful as fallback across years.
Non-core other income, not top-line sales.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Investment income, not sales revenue.

candidates.row_label: Items that will not be reclassified to the income statement
candidates.why: OCI item, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet accrual, not top-line revenue.
Balance sheet liability/accrual line, not revenue.

variables.notes: Priority list only; both labels represent the same top-line revenue.

candidates.row_label: Personnel expenses in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: A component of COGS, but subtotal/total COGS line exists.
A component of COGS, but subtotal/total COGS line exists.
Explicit COGS line; best direct mapping.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not period expense.

candidates.row_label: Finished products and goods for resale
candidates.why: Inventory balance, not COGS expense.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS line rather than summing components.

candidates.row_label: Personnel expenses in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: COGS component and should be excluded from SG&A.
Core selling overhead bucket above operating profit.
Subcomponent of Selling expenses; prefer broader populated bucket.
Subcomponent of Selling expenses; prefer broader populated bucket.
Core administrative overhead bucket above operating profit.
Subcomponent of Administrative expenses; prefer broader populated bucket.
Subcomponent of Administrative expenses; prefer broader populated bucket.
Contains mixed other operating items, including non-recurring/FX-related lines, so less clean than selling/admin buckets.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit combined SG&A row exists. Selected the main overhead buckets above operating profit and excluded COGS, D&A sublines, and noisier Other Operating Expenses rows.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not a current-period dedicated R&D expense line; also appears below EBIT in supplemental section.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense line is present on the income statement. The available R&D-related rows are capitalized-cost balance sheet items or supplemental amortization, not XRD.

candidates.why: Net finance cost bucket includes non-interest items like derivatives/FX; use only if granular components unavailable.

Derivative/fair value related, not recurring interest expense.

candidates.why: Recurring lease-related interest expense component.
Potential recurring finance costs beyond pure interest; acceptable as additional recurring finance-cost component.
Not finance cost.

candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; avoid double counting if main line selected.
Liability balance, not interest expense.

candidates.why: Income statement line, not book equity.
Income allocation line, not balance sheet equity.
